Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class AnimationRule

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.AnimationRule
public class AnimationRule extends Metadata

Java class for AnimationRule complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AnimationRule">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="animationFrequency" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="developerName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="recordTypeContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="recordTypeName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sobjectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="targetField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="targetFieldChangeToValues" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
